pi_items.verified_value: Real published academic papers from authoritative sources
pi_items.source: Web search verification: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al. 2017, NeurIPS), BERT (Devlin et al. 2019, NAACL), Deep Residual Learning (He et al. 2016, CVPR), On Computable Numbers (Turing 1936, LMS), Watson-Crick DNA structure (Nature 1953)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a Zotero library seeded with 18 real academic papers (10 classic foundational papers from 1905-1960 and 8 modern ML papers from 2012-2020). All papers are real, published papers from authoritative venues (Nature, NeurIPS, CVPR, NAACL, etc.). The library is pre-tagged with four topic labels: deep-learning (6 papers), foundational (5 papers), computer-vision (3 papers), and NLP (3 papers). The task requires assigning these tags to color positions 1-4 using Zotero's tag color feature.
